examples: He has netted 21 goals so far this season.
Two fourth-quarter drives netted a grand total of 21 yards.
A swoop by customs officers netted a large quantity of drugs.
That 72nd-minute score was quickly followed by a second netted by former Falkirk player Dermott McCaffrey.
And during his first season in the Highlands, the former Kilmarnock forward netted 19 times.
